## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Privacy Reminder ⚠️

**Before submitting, ensure you have:**

- [ ] Removed any real conversation content from this report (use synthetic examples)
- [ ] Removed any session keys, cookies, or tokens
- [ ] Redacted any sensitive information from logs, screenshots, or error messages

If this is a **security vulnerability**, please do NOT open an issue. Instead, report it privately via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/MatejGomboc/claude-chats-browser/security/advisories/new).
